_comment: exp_021 — pass-3 stage-1 + exp_014 rescue stack. SINGLE-variable swap from exp_018 (the proven 0.628 stack): source_experiment exp_017_pass2_stage1 → exp_020_pass3_stage1. Rescue model_id, rescue prompts, all token budgets, and vLLM sizing are IDENTICAL to exp_018/exp_014. Isolates whether exp_020's +1.77pp stage-1 lift compounds with the proven rescue stack. Target: > exp_018 local 60.39% → submit (current Kaggle best 0.628).

rescue._model_id_note: Kept as the exp_009 GRPO model (strict70), IDENTICAL to exp_018/exp_014. Keeps exp_021 a clean single-variable swap (only stage-1 model changed, from pass-2 to pass-3). Swapping the rescuer to a newer model would mix variables; defer that to a later experiment if exp_021 wins.

notes: Identical to exp_018 except source_experiment + stage1_dataset_name. Same rescue prompts, same rescuer model (strict70), same token budget, same vLLM sizing. Cheapest test of whether pass-3's stage-1 lift compounds with the existing rescue stack.
